scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const d of ['.next','.next-dev/types','.next-dev-webpack/types']) fs.rmSync(d, { recursive: true, force: true });" && next build
scripts.dev: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const d of ['.next-dev/types','.next-dev-webpack/types']) fs.rmSync(d, { recursive: true, force: true });" && dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e .env.local -e ../../packages/database/.env -- cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION=true NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev next dev --turbopack -p 2221
scripts.dev:infisical: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const d of ['.next-dev/types','.next-dev-webpack/types']) fs.rmSync(d, { recursive: true, force: true });" && infisical run --env=dev --path=/apps/capsule-pro/app --project-config-dir=../.. -- cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION=true NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:2223 next dev --turbopack -p 2221
scripts.dev:webpack: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const d of ['.next-dev/types','.next-dev-webpack/types']) fs.rmSync(d, { recursive: true, force: true });" && infisical run --env=dev --path=/apps/capsule-pro/app --project-config-dir=../.. -- cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION=true NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:2223 next dev -p 2221
